name: devtask-manager
description: Full-stack task management application with JWT auth and Kanban board

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/.next backend/dist
scripts.type-check: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../backend && npx tsc --noEmit

author: Alpsahin60
